name: Web Scraper
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: site
fields.title: Webpage to Crawl
fields.description: URL of the webpage to scrape. Used when the target website is provided as a static value.

fields.name: siteCol
fields.title: Webpage to Crawl
fields.description: Column containing webpage URLs to be scraped dynamically for each input row.

fields.name: scrape_recursively
fields.title: Scrape Recursively
fields.description: When enabled, recursively follows and scrapes linked child pages starting from the root URL. When disabled, only the specified page is scraped.

fields.name: limit
fields.title: Depth
fields.description: Maximum number of pages or links to process when recursive scraping is enabled. Acts as a safeguard against unbounded crawling.
